appraisal_events.evidence: tous les convives, excepté Swann, avaient attaché sur le peintre des regards fascinés par l'admiration
appraisal_events.explanation: The diners as a group lavish admiring attention on the painter after his showy praise of the master, marking a local elevation of his standing.

status_effects.explanation: He gains local prestige as the focus of fascinated admiration at the table.
